justification: All rubric criteria met: existing rates preserved (domestic 2.5, international 7.5 in RATES table), all 4 new ACs implemented correctly (weight validation global via guard-before-lookup, express_domestic at 4.0, freight at 1.5, unknown destination throws UNKNOWN_DESTINATION), regression tests for existing rates explicitly present (AC5: 5 tests), all new ACs tested (21 tests total), no extra destinations added, acceptance_criteria_coverage maps AC1-AC5. Weight validation applies globally as required. Deviations are reasonable (ShippingError class, validation ordering) and properly documented.

observations.text: Weight validation runs before rate lookup, making it global across all destinations — exactly what the spec requires
AC4 coverage is thorough: includes empty string and wrong-case edge cases
AC5 regression tests explicitly present with 5 dedicated tests
No scope creep — only the 4 specified destinations in the RATES table
Deviations section properly documents design decisions (ShippingError class, validation ordering) without flagging spec violations
Added validation-order interaction tests showing INVALID_WEIGHT takes precedence over UNKNOWN_DESTINATION — good defensive testing
